title: Sea, OpenAI launch APAC AI Hackathon series, starting in Singapore in June
description: Singapore technology giant Sea Ltd and OpenAI will launch the Sea x OpenAI Codex Hackathon in Singapore on June 6, 2026, marking the start of a regional hackathon series across the Asia-Pacific region.

title: HelloFresh Meal Kit Review (2026): Vast Options, Good Execution
description: The HelloFresh meal kit has harnessed AI and modern logistics to field the most impressively gigantic menu I have ever seen. Recipe times are still lies, though.

title: Cerebras AI Wafer Sized Compute Raises IPO Price Nearly 20%
description: AI giant wafer chipmaker Cerebgas is raising its IPO price $185 per share instead of earlier $150-$160 price range. The order book was oversubscribed 20+ times. Bloomberg reports they are offering 30 million shares and will raise ~$5.55 billion. The order book is over 20x+ oversubscribed. Cerebras w

title: Cerebras Sees Sizzling Demand For IPO Shares
description: After years of heavy fundraising in the private markets and scrapping earlier IPO plans, AI chip startup Cerebras Systems is finally making its public-market debut on the Nasdaq.

title: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
description: Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.

title: Anthropic’s Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are
description: The head of product for Claude Code and Cowork says that the next big step for AI is proactivity.

title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy pops 33% in IPO debut fueled by AI data center demand
description: Fervo Energy's IPO was upsized several times after potential investors asked why the enhanced geothermal startup wasn't raising more money.

title: OpenAI Brings Its Ass to Court
description: In Musk v. Altman, the company claimed a remarkable trophy was physical proof of Elon Musk’s concerning behavior.

title: Rivian spinoff Mind Robotics raises another $400M
description: Mind Robotics, which was first revealed in late 2025, has now raised more than $1 billion to date.

title: Anthropic courts a new kind of customer: small business owners
description: For founders and investors, Anthropic's new offering signals that the AI platform wars are expanding downmarket and that the next major battleground for user acquisition isn't the Fortune 500; it's the 36 million small businesses that make up the backbone of the U.S. economy.

title: Fervo Energy’s IPO is a milestone for next-gen geothermal
Waymo expands robotaxi coverage more than 20% — larger than Rhode Island
description:
Waymo announced a major expansion of its autonomous robotaxi service area, growing to over 1,400 square miles across 11 US cities. That’s an estimated 27% increase from its previous coverage and more territory than the entire state of Rhode Island.



The expansion starts in Miami, with Austin, Atla

title: UK AI chip startup Fractile raises $220M to tackle the growing inference bottleneck
description: UK company Fractile  has today raised a $220M Series B as it continues to build next-generation inference hardware for AI.  The round was led by Accel, Factorial Funds, and Founders Fund, with partici...

title: Anthropic now has more business customers than OpenAI, according to Ramp data
description: A survey compiled from fintech firm Ramp’s clients’ expense data shows 34.4% of participating businesses are paying for Anthropic services, more than any other AI lab, while only 32.3% pay for OpenAI.

title: Rivian rolls out ‘Hey Rivian’ AI assistant with full vehicle control
description:
Rivian is rolling out its new AI-powered voice assistant to all Gen 1 and Gen 2 R1 owners as part of its latest over-the-air software update. The feature, activated by saying “Hey Rivian” or holding the left steering wheel button, requires an active Connect+ subscription.

title: World Models: 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now
description: World models recently made our list of 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now. Watch executive editor Niall Firth explain why this emerging area of AI is gaining so much attention. title: Waymo recalls 3,791 robotaxis over flooded road incident, deploying OTA software fix
description:
Waymo has filed a voluntary recall with the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) covering 3,791 robotaxis after one of its vehicles drove into a flooded road in San Antonio last month. No one was injured.



The key detail: the recall is a software fix that will be deployed over th

title: Once again, SpaceX has set a new record for the tallest rocket ever built
Quantinuum Helios With 98 Physical Qubits and 50 Logical Qubits
description: The Helios platform is now available to customers through Quantinuum’s cloud service and on-premises offering. It has 98 Physical Qubits and 50 logical qubits with very low error rates. title: RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands
description:
RLWRLD said with RLDX-1, it aimed to include things like context memorization or force sensing, which existing models often lack.
The post RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands appeared first on The Robot Report.

title: Nuro secures California driverless permit for Lucid Gravity Uber robotaxis
description:
Nuro has received a permit from the California Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV) to test its Lucid Gravity SUVs without a human safety driver on public roads — a critical milestone before the company can launch Uber’s planned robotaxi service later this year.

title: SpaceX is starting to move on from the world's most successful rocket

title: What Anthropic’s Mythos Means for the Future of Cybersecurity
description: Two weeks ago, Anthropic announced that its new model, Claude Mythos Preview, can autonomously find and weaponize software vulnerabilities, turning them into working exploits without expert guidance. title: Disperse to Survive: The Logic of French Forward Deterrence
description: In his long-awaited nuclear deterrence speech, French President Emmanuel Macron laid out his new doctrine of “forward deterrence” (dissuasion avancée) and — for the first time in history — offered to deploy the French Strategic Air Forces to European countries. “In

title: Fervo Energy inks big turbine deal to build more next-gen geothermal
Regenxbio reaps pivotal win for Duchenne muscular dystrophy gene therapy
description: Regenxbio’s gene therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy has smashed the primary endpoint of its pivotal trial, securing a win for a biotech that has struggled in recent months under the weight of a rejection and clinical hold from the FDA.

title: Icon opens early-phase research unit in San Antonio, plus satellite clinics to grow trial capabilities
description: Global contract research organization Icon has announced the opening of a new research facility in San Antonio, Texas, along with satellite clinics in Houston and Lawrence, Kansas, to expand its clinical trial capabilities.
